scope.separateProjectGuardrail: Do not reuse or modify AgentFactoryDemo.

liveTaskClaim.requirement: Live Action Center task claims require a numeric task ID, task type, folder, status snapshots, and tenant-qualified deep link captured from UiPath.
liveTaskClaim.creationMethod: Created through the installed UiPath Tasks SDK GenericTasks/CreateTask surface because the public uip tasks CLI exposes read/assign/complete commands but no create command.

results: Login succeeded for cloud.uipath.com organization galacticus tenant DefaultTenant.
Folder 7986316 exposed one task-eligible DirectoryUser; personal reviewer identifiers are intentionally not committed.
Folder 7986316 returned an empty Action Center task list at discovery time.

commandsRun: uip tasks complete 4401667 --type ExternalTask --folder-id 7986316 --data '{"clinicalAttestation":"Approved for synthetic demo after reviewing policy citations and evidence matrix. No real patient data used.","reviewNotes":"Evidence is source-backed; diagnosis severity remains governed by clinician attestation before payer submission."}' --output json
results: Task 4401667 was created in folder 7986316 with ExternalTag TACC-2026-001.
Task 4401667 was assigned to the discovered task-eligible reviewer.
Task 4401667 was completed with synthetic clinician attestation text.
Final readback returned Status Completed and the synthetic completion payload.
liveExecution.sideEffects: one synthetic Action Center ExternalTask created, assigned, and completed after explicit approval

creation.preferredStep: Run the approved Maestro, Flow, Coded Agent, API Workflow, or installed UiPath Tasks SDK path that creates exactly one synthetic human gate bound to the clinician validation contract.
evidenceRequired: task key if returned by UiPath

completion.commandTemplate: uip tasks complete <task-id> --type ExternalTask --folder-id 7986316 --data '{"clinicalAttestation":"Clinician-approved synthetic evidence text goes here.","reviewNotes":"Synthetic demo attestation only; no real patient or medical advice."}' --output json

maestroInlineHitlStatus.faultSummary: Inline Maestro Flow HITL QuickForm reached the Action Center/AppTasks request but faulted with ExternalTag field validation in the runtime serializer.
maestroInlineHitlStatus.productionNextStep: Bind the HITL node to a deployed Action App/FormTask catalog surface or use the verified ExternalTask creation path for the human gate.

deepLinkRules.notes: Use the standalone pattern with numeric task ID when no task key is returned. Never emit a tenant-less Action Center link.

useOnlyIf: Action Center or Actions service is not registered or discoverable after tenant/folder discovery.
No task-eligible reviewer or group can be discovered for folder 7986316 after official activation checks.
The approved task creation path fails with a licensing, permission, catalog, or feature-capability blocker.
The current uip tasks surface remains read/assign/complete only and no approved HITL workflow creation surface is available before recording.
fallback.proofSurface: UiPath-controlled event mirror record written by the approved H1 Data Service/API Workflow path.
fallback.requiredUiLabel: UiPath-controlled human gate fallback - no live Action Center task created

requiredEvent.input_summary: Action Center task creation was blocked or unavailable after discovery; synthetic unsupported claim remains gated.
requiredEvent.output_summary: Human gate shown as UiPath-controlled fallback, not as a live Action Center task.

fallback.approvalGatedCommandTemplate: uip api-workflow run uipath/api-workflows/write-event.workflow.json --input-arguments '{"apiBaseUrl":"<mock-healthcare-api-url>","caseId":"case-syn-001","maestroCaseId":"maestro-case-placeholder-001","actorName":"UiPath Human Gate Fallback","taskOrAgentName":"TreatmentAccessWriteEvent","action":"human_gate_fallback_recorded","inputSummary":"Action Center task creation was blocked or unavailable after discovery; synthetic unsupported claim remains gated.","outputSummary":"Human gate shown as UiPath-controlled fallback, not as a live Action Center task.","evidenceRefs":["uipath/action-center/live-proof/clinician-validation-task-payload.json","uipath/action-center/contracts/clinician-evidence-validation.quickform.json"],"traceId":"checkpoint8-action-center-fallback"}' --output json
